channel.title: PYT Radar
channel.description: Podcast & YouTube Tracking — automated episode digest. Tracking mentions of Karen Bass, Nithya Raman, and more across podcasts and YouTube.

item.title: Veritas Imperium: This episode of Adam Carolla's show discusses the LA Times owner's statement tha
item.description:
Veritas Imperium
"LA Times Says Supporting Karen Bass Was a Misstep | Adam Carolla Show News - Daily Podcast" – Published 2026-03-20

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Negative

This episode of Adam Carolla's show discusses the LA Times owner's statement that endorsing Karen Bass for LA mayor was a mistake due to her incompetence in handling the recent LA fires. The hosts criticize Bass's leadership and contrast her with Rick Caruso, who they argue would have been more pragmatic.

Key moment at 05:50: "The LA Times owner says endorsing Karen Bass was a mistake due to incompetence." – Speaker A

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Kamal (The Shadowban Man) Johnson: This episode discusses LA Mayor Karen Bass's announcement of $1 million in fundi
item.description:
Kamal (The Shadowban Man) Johnson
"Jack Harlow Feels Blacker|LA Mayor Karen Bass Homeless Problem Update + More" – Published 2026-03-19

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Negative

This episode discusses LA Mayor Karen Bass's announcement of $1 million in funding to prevent homelessness in Little Tokyo, which the host criticizes as helping Asian communities while ignoring the higher rates of Black homelessness in LA. The host views this as evidence that politicians can help specific groups but choose not to help Black Americans.

Key moment at 20:37: "This woman is from our lineage but not helping out the lineage. She helping out Asian folks." – Speaker A

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Lincoln Square: LA Mayor Karen Bass discusses her administration's response to Trump-era ICE enf
item.description:
Lincoln Square
"LA Mayor Karen Bass Sounds Alarm on Trump’s ICE Tactics" – Published 2026-03-26

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Mixed

LA Mayor Karen Bass discusses her administration's response to Trump-era ICE enforcement tactics in Los Angeles. She explains her executive directive to limit ICE operations and describes the escalating brutality of immigration raids under the Trump administration.

Key moment at 03:54: "I would have never imagined that I have to protect myself from my own government." – Karen Bass

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Rae for LA: This is Rae Huang's own podcast episode where she hosts Nick Caputo to discuss L
item.description:
Rae for LA
"A conversation with LA mayoral candidate Rae Huang and Nick Caputo of Livable Advanced LA" – Published 2026-03-25

Match: Rae Huang (guest)

Sentiment: Positive

This is Rae Huang's own podcast episode where she hosts Nick Caputo to discuss LA's charter reform process. Rae is the host/interviewer discussing civic engagement and governmental reform as part of her mayoral campaign platform.

Key moment at 01:24: "A lot of folks recently saw me go viral. I was going to give public comment to the Charter Reform Commission and I got cut off immediately" – Rae Huang

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: John Kobylt Show & John Kobylt Radio: Spencer Pratt appears as an in-studio guest for the full hour on the John Kobylt
item.description:
John Kobylt Show & John Kobylt Radio
"LA Mayoral Candidate Spencer Pratt In Studio Interview With John Kobylt" – Published 2026-03-27

Match: Spencer Pratt (guest)

Sentiment: Positive

Spencer Pratt appears as an in-studio guest for the full hour on the John Kobylt Show, discussing his mayoral campaign for Los Angeles. He presents himself as the accountability candidate challenging incumbent Karen Bass and Nithia Ramen, focusing heavily on homelessness, law enforcement, and city corruption.

Key moment at 03:12: "I'm so excited to be running for mayor because I'm going to show them there are consequences and there are enough angry taxpayers, they're going to say, 'No more. You're done, Mayor Bass.'" – Spencer Pratt

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Off the Vine: Spencer Pratt appears as a guest on Kaitlyn Bristowe's podcast to discuss his ne
item.description:
Off the Vine with Kaitlyn Bristowe
"Spencer Pratt | Creating A Villain, His New Memoir, & Running For LA Mayor!" – Published 2026-03-24

Match: Spencer Pratt (guest)

Sentiment: Positive

Spencer Pratt appears as a guest on Kaitlyn Bristowe's podcast to discuss his new memoir 'The Guy You Love to Hate.' The wide-ranging conversation covers his reality TV villain persona, life experiences from The Hills, recent house fire tragedy, and his campaign for LA mayor.

Key moment at 52:26: "I would rather have my house and my hummingbirds back than this book and running for mayor." – Spencer Pratt

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Pat Brown Institute at Cal State LA: This is an in-depth interview with Adam Miller, a mayoral candidate for Los Ange
item.description:
Pat Brown Institute at Cal State LA
"On the Record with Adam Miller" – Published 2026-03-25

Match: Adam Miller (guest)

Sentiment: Neutral

This is an in-depth interview with Adam Miller, a mayoral candidate for Los Angeles, discussing his background as an entrepreneur and nonprofit leader, and his vision for fixing the city's problems through better leadership and management.

Key moment at 05:02: "The city needs to be fixed and we need a builder to fix it. And I'm that builder." – Adam Miller

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript

item.title: Bloomberg Podcasts: This Bloomberg podcast episode features an interview with Los Angeles Mayor Kare
item.description:
Bloomberg Podcasts
"Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass Talks Public Transit | Bloomberg Talks" – Published 2026-03-28

Match: Karen Bass (guest)

Sentiment: Positive

This Bloomberg podcast episode features an interview with Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass discussing various challenges facing the city including high gas prices, housing affordability, public transit, and major upcoming events. Bass speaks extensively about her administration's progress on homelessness reduction, public safety improvements, and preparations for hosting the World Cup and Olympics.

Key moment at 08:11: "We've had a decrease in street homelessness of 18%." – Karen Bass

▶ Watch Episode 📄 Summary | 📄 Full Transcript
